data.title: BNB Drops Below 840 USDT with a 6.69% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 30, 2026, 02:22 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 840 USDT and is now trading at 839.900024 USDT, with a narrowed 6.69% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Caldera and BitcoinOS Forge Partnership to Advance Bitcoin Rollup Development
data.description: Caldera has announced a strategic partnership with BitcoinOS to enhance the development of modular Bitcoin-native rollups. According to Odaily, this collaboration aims to integrate Caldera's production-grade RaaS technology stack with BitcoinOS's trust-minimized settlement system. The partnership seeks to offer developers rapid rollup deployment, a flexible execution environment, and Bitcoin-native security primitives, while maintaining a clear path for upgrades to decentralized sequencing, ZK proofs, and external state anchoring. The two entities will collaborate on ecosystem rollup support, proof verification layer integration, and market promotion.

data.title: The US dollar index (DXY) rose 20 points in the short term, last trading at 96.72.
data.description: The US dollar index (DXY) rose 20 points in the short term, last trading at 96.72, after reports that the Trump administration was preparing to confirm former Federal Reserve Governor Kevin Warsh's nomination as Federal Reserve Chair. (Jinshi)

data.title: On Polymarket, the probability of "Kevin Warsh being nominated as the new Federal Reserve Chairman" has surged to 95%.
data.description: According to data from the prediction market Polymarket, the probability of former Federal Reserve Governor Kevin Warsh being nominated by Trump as the new chairman of the Federal Reserve has surged again to 95%.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation AI Lead: The ERC-8004 standard has been released on the Ethereum mainnet.
data.description: Davide Crapis, Head of AI at the Ethereum Foundation, announced on the X platform that the ERC-8004 standard has been released on the Ethereum mainnet. This standard is a specification for trustless agents, and over 10,000 agents had previously registered on the testnet. Starting today, the standard is officially released on the Ethereum mainnet, launching the 8004 genesis month event.

data.title: Caldera and BitcoinOS have entered into a strategic partnership to advance the development of modular Bitcoin native rollups.
data.description: Caldera has announced an ecosystem partnership with BitcoinOS. This collaboration aims to accelerate the development of modular, native Bitcoin Rollups. The plan is to combine Caldera's production-grade RaaS technology stack with bitcoinOS's trust-minimized settlement system, providing developers with rapid rollup deployment, a flexible execution environment, and native Bitcoin security primitives, while preserving a clear path to upgrades to decentralized ordering, ZK proofs, and external state anchoring. The two companies will collaborate on joint support for ecosystem rollups, deep integration of proof verification layers, and market promotion.

data.title: Dollar Index Sees Significant Daily Increase
data.description: The dollar index (DXY) has experienced a notable rise of 0.5% within the day, currently standing at 96.64. According to ChainCatcher, this increase reflects ongoing fluctuations in the currency market. The dollar index is a measure of the value of the United States dollar relative to a basket of foreign currencies, and its movements are closely monitored by investors and analysts. The recent uptick may influence various economic sectors and trading strategies.

data.title: U.S. Secretary of State Rubio to Attend White House Meeting
data.description: U.S. Secretary of State Rubio is scheduled to participate in a meeting and briefing at the White House tomorrow, according to Jin10. The agenda for the meeting has not been disclosed.

data.title: After his long positions in ETH were liquidated, Ma Ji reopened them, and has now accumulated losses exceeding $25.88 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, as the market declined, Machi Big Brother's (@machibigbrother) 25x leveraged ETH long position was completely liquidated. Machi Big Brother subsequently opened another 25x leveraged ETH long position. Currently, Machi Big Brother's losses exceed $25.88 million.

data.title: CZ: We will address the recent FUD attacks during tonight's AMA.
data.description: CZ posted on the X platform that this is not the first, and will certainly not be the last, FUD attack. CZ stated that they have been under FUD attack since day one, and tonight's AMA will provide an in-depth explanation of the causes and methods of this attack. CZ added that while competitors are focusing on Binance, they will continue to focus on building and growth.

data.title: In the past hour, $777 million in positions were liquidated across the entire network, and the total amount of liquidations in the past 24 hours has climbed to $1.743 billion.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $777 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past hour, with $766 million of that liquidation occurring in long positions. In the last 24 hours, a total of 275,142 people worldwide were liquidated, with a total liquidation amount of $1.743 billion. The largest single liquidation occurred in the HTX BTC-USDT trading pair, valued at $80.5799 million.

data.title: BTC and ETH experienced sharp drops, resulting in the liquidation of a total of $146 million from two long positions.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, as the price of BTC fell to $81,118 and the price of ETH fell to $2,689, two large addresses were liquidated. Hyperliquid ETH long positions worth $65.14 million were liquidated, and HTX BTC long positions worth $80.58 million were liquidated. The two addresses collectively liquidated $146 million, accounting for 8.4% of the total liquidation value in the past 24 hours.

data.title: Exxon Mobil Anticipates Earnings Boost Amid Oil Price Surge
data.description: Exxon Mobil is preparing to announce its earnings, with projections indicating a potential rally toward $150, fueled by recent increases in oil prices reaching a four-month high in the United States. According to NS3.AI, while fourth-quarter upstream earnings might experience a slight dip due to reduced liquid prices, the company's strategic portfolio reshaping and emphasis on carbon capture present opportunities for growth. Analysts continue to uphold overweight ratings and express optimism with price targets exceeding the current market price of $122.91.

data.title: Kevin Warsh Emerges as Leading Candidate for Federal Reserve Chair
data.description: Kevin Warsh has become the leading candidate for the position of Federal Reserve Chair, with his chances of appointment rising to 85%. According to ChainCatcher, data from Polymarket indicates a significant shift in probabilities, with BlackRock's Global Fixed Income Chief Investment Officer, Rieder, now having an 8% chance of being appointed.

data.title: Historic IPO Launches Anticipated for 2026 with SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic
data.description:
The Kobeissi Letter posted on X that the year 2026 is expected to witness historic initial public offerings (IPOs) with major companies like SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic leading the charge. SpaceX is projected to debut with a valuation of $1.5 trillion, while OpenAI is anticipated to exceed a $1 trillion valuation. Anthropic is also expected to make a significant impact with a $500 billion valuation.

In addition to these IPOs, reports have surfaced suggesting that Elon Musk is contemplating a merger between SpaceX and Tesla/xAI. If realized, this would represent the largest corporate merger in history, further highlighting the rapid acceleration of the AI revolution.

data.title: CFTC Chairman: New rules will be developed for prediction markets
data.description: CFTC Chairman Rostin Behnam stated that the agency has decided to develop new rules for prediction markets due to significant increases in trading volume on platforms such as Kalshi and Polymarket during the 2024 US election. Behnam noted that the prediction market currently lacks regulatory transparency, and the new rules aim to establish a clearer operational framework and regulatory standards to address the growing market demand. (Bloomberg)
